reviews.text:
Liked: Sehr hilfsbereites, freundliches und fähiges Personal. Trotz Ankunft vor abgegebener Check-In-Zeit durfte das Zimmer bereits bezogen werden. Großes und bewachtes Parkhaus, ideal wenn man einen Mietwagen hat. 
Das Frühstück ist umfassend und das Personal freundlich. Einzig zur Rushour kann es etwas eng werden. Aber jeder findet seinen Platz.
Die Lage ist ideal für Tagestouren in alle Richtungen. Die berühmte Long-Street ist zu Fuß auch nachts gut und auf kurzem Weg zu erreichen. Die allgemeine Sicherheitslage nach Einbruch der Dunkelheit verbessert das Hotel mit Sicherheitspersonal.

reviews.text:
Liked: Location: Central location just across the street from the CTICC. Walking distance to Long and Bree streets, lots of conveniences close by. 
Staff: Professional, warm, helpful, and knowledgeable. Definitely a huge asset to the hotel. Everyone was lovely. 
Room: Really lovely, modern, and well-appointed; just like photos, larger than expected, very clean. Kitchen is fully functional with the glasses, cutlery, and tableware needed. Comfortable bed, lush! And couch was also very comfortable. Appreciated the lighting, lamps, recessed lighting, warm or bright light... helpful for the whole range from putting on makeup or reading to resting in low comfy light. Also large wardrobe with shelves, robes and slippers provided!
Bathroom: clean, compact, no counterspace but does have two useful drawers under the sink. Really nice smelling bath products. Powerful shower.
Added bonus: there's a 4th floor lounge with patio balcony that has amazing views of Table Mountain day and night. You can sit here and watch a game, have a drink, and even order from the restaurant downstairs
And the spa though small is really nice!. Skilled staff, and a very relaxing experience. They make you feel special and pampered. | Disliked: Not much!

We sincerely appreciate your constructive comments regarding the kitchen amenities. We understand how having essentials like a coffee plunger, bottle opener/corkscrew, and dishwashing supplies can make a stay more comfortable, especially during a longer visit. We're sorry for the inconvenience this caused, particularly with the bottle opener. Your experience is certainly not the standard we aim to provide.

reviews.text:
Liked: Location was perfect as you could if you wanted to, walk it to the VA Waterfront. Staff was always smiling and happy to help. The beds were super comfortable and the rooms spacious as well as having spacious storage for clothes and belongings with a safe to keep valuables secure. | Disliked: Upon arrival my mother was supposed to have a room with a balcony but sadly didn't. We brought this up as prior to booking I enquired if all rooms had a balcony and I was told that they do. Sadly they don't. Despite this though after I brought it up with Staff, the next morning management advised another room with a balcony was now available so they helped my Mum move into the new room. 
Also the toilet bowl in our 2 bedroom appartment was a little dirty but this was super clean the next day. 
Any problems we brought up with them, was quickly addressed and rectified.

reviews.text: Liked: Check in went very smoothly and reception staff were very welcoming and friendly. The room was very spacious and comfortable, and the little kitchenette has everything you need if you want to do some basic self catering on those slightly longer stays. Walking distance from the CTICC, so well worth a look if you need to attend an event there. The on-site restaurant, YU, has some great Asian fusion food on the menu at fairly average Cape Town prices. The Bar has a good selection of drinks on offer and the establishment offers a very nice Spa and Gym facility too.The staff were very friendly, professional and welcoming! The onsite free parking is a real plus in Cape Town, and after asking nicely they even allowed me to leave my vehicle parked there the next day (after checking out!) while I conducted business! FREE OF CHARGE! That's going the extra mile indeed.It isn't located in the most touristy area of Cape Town, so I would definitely recommend this hotel more to visitors having to do business in the city. However, transport (Public, Shuttle Service and Uber, etc) is available right in front of the hotel, so getting around is not a problem at all.This establishment will see me again for future business trips to Cape Town. | Disliked: Breakfast was a bit disappointing (I had the Farmer's Breakfast), but overall the selection on offer is good and again the service was friendly and efficient. My recommendation would be to just stick to the Continental Breakfast offering, as the cooked breakfast options are fairly average and I wasn't too impressed with my Farmer's Breakfast.

reviews.owner_answer:
Dear Adriaan, Thank you very much for taking the time to review The Onyx Hotel after your recent stay with us.
We’re delighted to hear that you enjoyed a smooth check-in experience and found our reception team welcoming and friendly.
It’s wonderful to know that your apartment offered the space and comfort you were looking for, and that the kitchenette proved useful during your stay. We're also glad that our location near the CTICC suited your business needs so well, and that our on-site facilities, from YU Restaurant and The Bar to our spa, gym, and complimentary parking, added value to your experience. 
We also appreciate your honest feedback about breakfast. While we’re pleased that the service met your expectations, we're sorry to hear that the Farmer’s Breakfast didn’t quite hit the mark. Your comments have been shared with our Food & Beverage team so we can continue improving and refining our offerings. 
Thank you for recommending The Onyx Hotel to fellow business travellers. We sincerely hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back again in the near future. Kind Regards, Marelize Mare

Dear Shaheema, Thank you very much for taking the time to review The Onyx Hotel after your recent stay with us.

reviews.text: Liked: The hotel for what we paid was outstanding but any business is only as good as the people who look after you and the staff at the hotel are amazing, they made us feel welcome and at home, always pleasant, happy to help, polite, warming and considerate. The room was spotless and the gym was perfect and even better open all hours so I was able to workout when it suited me. Our breakfast's were very good and all the staff went out of there way to make sure we had everything that we needed. The VA is a 10 minute walk from the hotel and we felt safe walking there at all times. We would highly recommend this hotel to anyone who is looking for a city break, great value for money, clean and tidy with a beautiful view of Table Mountain as the icing on the cake! We would certainly stay there again and hope to return in the future.

reviews.text: Liked: Incredibly friendly and professional staff - special mention to Promise (Pro) at the bar. The hotel is beautifully decorated with a modern, stylish touch. It was also perfectly located for our needs, just a short and convenient distance from the Royal Cape Yacht Club where we had to be every day. All in all, a great experience and one I’d happily recommend! | Disliked: What we didn’t like, unfortunately, are things that seem to have been mentioned in reviews for over a year now, so it’s disappointing that they haven’t been addressed. For a self-catering unit, the basics were lacking - no salt or pepper, no oil for cooking, no dishwashing liquid, and very limited cutlery and utensils. Simple items like a bottle opener and spatula were also missing, which made basic food prep and meals more frustrating than they needed to be.Additionally, for the ladies, there's no proper station to do hair or makeup. The only plug even somewhat close to a mirror was in the kitchen, which is far from ideal when trying to blow-dry or straighten your hair. These small touches really matter when it comes to comfort and convenience, and it would be great to see the hotel make improvements in this regard.

reviews.review_title: Apart from a few things, the stay was really great
reviews.owner_answer:
Dear Ashley, Thank you very much for taking the time to review The Onyx Hotel after your recent stay with us. We’re thrilled to hear that you enjoyed your stay overall, and especially pleased that Promise (Pro) at the bar made such a positive impression. We’ll be sure to pass on your kind words to the team. It’s also wonderful to know that our central location and modern décor suited your needs perfectly.
We do, however, want to sincerely apologize for the inconveniences you encountered in the self-catering setup. Your feedback is incredibly valuable, and we understand how frustrating it must have been to find the kitchen lacking essentials. Please rest assured that we are actively reviewing these recurring points of feedback with our team and property management. Our aim is to ensure every aspect of our apartments is as thoughtfully equipped and guest friendly as possible, and your detailed comments help us identify where we can do better.
Thank you again for your honest feedback and your recommendation. We sincerely hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back again in the near future. Kind Regards, Marelize Marè
reviews.author: Ashley

reviews.text: Liked: The Onyx has an excellent location, just a short distance from the V&A Waterfront and within walking distance to the Cape Town International Convention Centre. The facilities were fantastic, and the staff service was superb. The apartment was nicely decorated and furnished, and the bed was comfortable. Access to rooms via the lifts is secure and easy to use. Parking levels are well-lit, and the bays are pretty broad, so parking was easy. The Yu restaurant served delicious Asian cuisine. | Disliked: More hot vegan/ vegetarian options for breakfast would be nice. Perhaps potato wedges and sautéed mushrooms, which everybody could enjoy :)

reviews.text: Liked: Room (studio) was great: quiet, excellent bed and linen quality. The small kitchen had all you need for a short stay: glasses, mugs, and some crockery/pots if one decides to cook something. There was no corkscrew, however. Large fridge with freezer compartment, which was quite noisy at night but easy to switch off. Large TV with Netflix. Parking more than sufficient.Staff was extremely helpful.  We have stayed here before and would definitely return. We didn't make use of the breakfast as we were seeing friends for breakfast. The inhouse gym was a nice addition, we used it both mornings.

reviews.text: Liked: Friendly and helpful staff. Central Location. The apartment was clean and had everything required. Breakfast was okay. Dinner option was Asian Restaurant which was a negative for me. 4th Floor has beautiful, heated pool (part of it under cover). Beautiful views from the 4th floor patio/pool/seating area. There was a gym and spa too. Smoking allowed on the patio of the 4th floor only. There was a bar there too and it is very peaceful and quiet. The bar serves food from the breakfast/lunch restaurant which is only open until 3pm. From there on if you want food without leaving the accommodation you can only get it from the Asian Restaurant. The outside patio on the 4th floor could use a couple of umbrellas for shade (it is completely without any cover). | Disliked: An all-day restaurant with a variety of food. Shade on the patio of the 4th floor. Better beds (was too hard).
